privileged_info_summary: The environment runs a local JFrog Artifactory instance at http://localhost:8082 with default credentials (admin/password). The task requires the creation of a local Maven repository. The exact parameters required for successful verification are: repository key 'team-releases', repository type 'LOCAL', and package type 'maven'. The requested description is 'Team release artifacts repository'.
